name: afa-ai-workflow-template
description: Submission template for the AFA 2027 Special Session on Papers Written with Generative AI Workflows. Bundles submission-tracking skills, calibration, Corbis-powered research skills, command-compatibility wrappers, MCP config, and lifecycle hooks.

interface.shortDescription: AFA 2027 AI workflow submission scaffold and research skills.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for the AFA 2027 Special Session on Papers Written with Generative AI Workflows. Provides submission-tracking skills that maintain the initial prompt, conversation transcripts, human time log, and contribution report under submission/, plus calibration and research skills for literature review, positioning, landscape figures, idea generation, idea screening, and citation verification. Includes Corbis MCP config and Codex lifecycle hooks.
defaultPrompt: Log this AI conversation as a transcript under submission/conversations/.
